titleStmt.title: Yunfeng shan cliff inscription (1): Lun jing shu shi (rubbing)
雲峰山刻石 — 論經書詩 / 詩五言與道俗□人出萊城東南九里登雲峰山論經書一首（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Yunfeng shan cliff inscription (1): Lun jing shu shi. GENUINE Zheng Daozhao. The Yunfeng shan (雲峰山) cliff-carved poem on viewing/discussing scriptures. Part of 鄭道昭碑全集 series. Duplicate copies of this same inscription also held at Berkeley under records 244401 (北魏鄭道昭碑全拓舊本 set) and 244436 (雲峰山全套 set). UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Northern Wei, 511. Creator: 鄭道昭撰並書, carved by 于仙人 (Yu Xianren).

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
